mapper.select: SELECT sdd.id, sdd.label, sdd.`value`, sdd.is_default, sdd.`status`, sdd.css_class, sdd.list_class, sdd.remark, sdd.sort_order FROM sys_dict_data sdd WHERE sdd.del_flag = '0' AND sdd.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dict_data sdd SET del_flag = '0' WHERE del_flag = '0' AND sdd.id IN
#{item}
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET status = 1 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET status = 0 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET is_default = 0 WHERE is_default = 1 AND parent_id = #{parentId}
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.value, t1.label FROM sys_dict_data t1 JOIN sys_dict_type t2 ON t1.parent_id = t2.id AND t2.del_flag = '0' AND t2.status = #{statusEnable} WHERE t1.del_flag = '0' AND t1.parent_id = #{parentId} AND t1.status = #{statusEnable}
